title: Bookbot Outcomes, Repository Baseline, and Evidence · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed maintenance review reconstructs bookbot outcomes, repository baseline, and evidence from repository state, input bytes, decoded text, tokens, counters, ranking keys, report records, stdout, stderr, exit status, tests, package artifact, and release evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for Bookbot outcome, corpus, repository, and evidence charter after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging…
objectives: Define the report user, decision, input corpus, output contract, consequence of error, and observable success before coding.
Record text owner, license or permission, source, version, checksum, language, and allowed use before analysis.
Inspect Git status, branch, remotes, configuration origin, tracked files, ignore rules, and baseline tests before editing.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-bookbot-python cumulative Unicode-safe text-analysis portfolio.

Browser execution uses original fixed in-memory fixtures and deterministic pure-Python models only.
Host files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, package installation, native profiling, load,
operating-system races, publication, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class TextPolicy:
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    normalization: str = "NFC"
    casefold: bool = True
    top_k: int = 10


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    corpus_id: str
    revision: str
    policy_version: str
    command_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Bookbot portfolio ready"

steps.title: Bookbot and Python Separate evidence from confidence · Review Evidence Ladder
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Bookbot team handles case 7229 during an offline public-library reading report. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate the Bookbot outcome on user need, corpus authority, repository state, and changed-case evidence; retain source permission, digest purpose, revision, Python, Unicode, policy, command, and output identity; then install the built wheel in a fresh environment and rerun success, invalid-argument, and decode-failure cases. Browser code uses pure bounded functions and original fixed fixtures only. Real files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, packages, installations, native profiling, operating-system races, load, publication, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Separate source, transformation, test, command, package, release, and stakeholder evidence so one green signal cannot hide another failure.

Inspect the Evidence Ladder trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

steps.title: Bookbot and Python Record what required effort · Review Evidence Ladder
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Evidence Ladder: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review Bookbot team handles case 6324 during a digital-humanities corpus revision. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate the Bookbot outcome on user need, corpus authority, repository state, and changed-case evidence; test empty, malformed, Unicode, tied, large, changed-policy, and rejected cases before accepting output; then split one word and one UTF-8 sequence across stream chunks and compare batch output byte-for-byte. Browser code uses pure bounded functions and original fixed fixtures only. Real files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, packages, installations, native profiling, operating-system races, load, publication, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Separate source, transformation, test, command, package, release, and stakeholder evidence so one green signal cannot hide another failure.

Evidence target: Bookbot and Python Record what required effort · Review Evidence Ladder.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Bookbot and Python Record what required effort · Review Evidence Ladder, keep Evidence Ladder connected to executable Python text-analysis, command, test, package, and release decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Separate source, transformation, test, command, package, release, and stakeholder evidence so one green signal cannot hide another failure.

hints: For Bookbot and Python Record what required effort · Review Evidence Ladder, name the stakeholder, corpus authority, revision, path, bytes, encoding, Unicode, token, count, rank, report, command, test, package, release, and transfer boundary, Evidence Ladder precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Bookbot and Python Record what required effort · Review Evidence Ladder, trace this concrete input and predict admission, decoding, normalization, tokenization, counting, ranking, formatting, stdout, stderr, status, test, package, failure, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A review Bookbot team handles case 6324 during a digital-humanities corpus revision. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate the Bookbot outcome on user need, corpus authority, repository state, and changed-case evidence; test empty, malformed, Unicode, tied, large, changed-policy, and rejected cases before accepting output; then split one word and one UTF-8 sequence across stream chunks and compare batch output byte-for-byte. Browser code uses pure bounded functions and original fixed fixtures only. Real files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, packages, installations, native profiling, operating-system races, load, publication, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Separate source, transformation, test, command, package, release, and stakeholder evidence so one green signal cannot hide another failure.

For Bookbot and Python Record what required effort · Review Evidence Ladder, challenge the documented misconception with changed-file, changed-encoding, Unicode, token, ranking, stream, CLI, test, package, security, accessibility, failure, recovery, and controlled native-transfer evidence: A passing unit test proves the installed command and report are correct.
